name: Dust to Dust
descs:
First Turn Start of a wave: inflict 5 [Combustion] Potency and +3 [Combustion] Count to all enemies. (for Abnormalities, one random Part)

When activating Sloth Absolute Resonance, inflict 3 [Combustion] Potency and +2 [Combustion] Count to all enemies (for Abnormalities, one random Part) at Combat Start.

First Turn Start of a wave: inflict 6 [Combustion] Potency and +3 [Combustion] Count to all enemies. (for Abnormalities, one Part)

When activating Sloth Absolute Resonance, inflict 4 [Combustion] Potency and +2 [Combustion] Count to all enemies (for Abnormalities, one Part) at Combat Start.

First Turn Start of a wave: inflict 8 [Combustion] Potency and +3 [Combustion] Count to all enemies (for Abnormalities, one random Part)

When activating Sloth Resonance, inflict 4 [Combustion] Potency and +3 [Combustion] Count to all enemies (for Abnormalities, one random Part) at Combat Start.
